title: The Rebbe's Ten Campaigns: Bringing Judaism to Every Jew
title_zh: 雷布的十大运动:将犹太教带给每一位犹太人
title_he: עשר המבצעים של הרבי: להביא יהדות לכל יהודי
author: Torah Light Editorial Team
key_people: Rabbi Menachem Mendel Schneerson (The Lubavitcher Rebbe)

chinese_historical_context.period: 1960s-1980s (Cultural Revolution and early Reform era in China)
parallels: Confucian principle of 'teach without distinction' (有教无类)
Buddhist concept of gradual cultivation (渐修)
Daoist practice of daily spiritual development
Confucian harmony in diversity (和而不同)
Traditional door guardians (门神) parallel to mezuzah

bibliography_sources.title: The Rebbe's Army: Inside the World of Chabad-Lubavitch
bibliography_sources.author: Sue Fishkoff
bibliography_sources.description: Comprehensive look at how the Rebbe's vision became a global movement

bibliography_sources.title: The Ten Mivtzo'im (Campaigns) of the Lubavitcher Rebbe
bibliography_sources.description: Official Chabad overview of the campaigns with historical context

bibliography_sources.title: The Life and Afterlife of Menachem Mendel Schneerson
bibliography_sources.author: Samuel Heilman & Menachem Friedman
bibliography_sources.description: Scholarly examination of the Rebbe's influence on modern Judaism

bibliography_sources.title: A Brief Guide to the Mitzvah Campaigns
bibliography_sources.description: Practical guide to implementing the campaigns today

bibliography_sources.title: Bringing Heaven Down to Earth: 365 Meditations from the Wisdom of the Rebbe
bibliography_sources.author: Tzvi Freeman
bibliography_sources.description: Daily wisdom derived from the Rebbe's teachings

bibliography_sources.title: The Rebbe: The Life and Afterlife of Menachem Mendel Schneerson
bibliography_sources.author: Ari Goldman
bibliography_sources.description: Biography exploring the Rebbe's vision and lasting impact

bibliography_sources.title: JEM: Jewish Educational Media - The Living Archive

bibliography_sources.title: The Unique Approach of Chabad Outreach
bibliography_sources.description: Modern application of the Rebbe's campaign philosophy

summary.en: An exploration of the Lubavitcher Rebbe's ten visionary campaigns to bring Jewish observance to every Jew through accessible, non-judgmental, incremental mitzvot. The article explains each campaign, the strategy of 'one mitzvah at a time,' parallels with Chinese philosophy, global impact, and practical applications for modern life.
summary.zh: 探索卢巴维奇雷布的十项远见卓识的运动,通过可及、非评判性、渐进式的诫命将犹太教遵守带给每一位犹太人。文章解释了每项运动、'一次一项诫命'的策略、与中国哲学的相似之处、全球影响以及现代生活的实际应用。
summary.he: חקירה של עשרת המבצעים החזוניים של הרבי מליובאוויטש להביא שמירת מצוות לכל יהודי דרך מצוות נגישות, לא-שיפוטיות והדרגתיות. המאמר מסביר כל מבצע, האסטרטגיה של 'מצווה אחת בכל פעם', הקבלות לפילוסופיה הסינית, ההשפעה העולמית ויישומים מעשיים לחיים המודרניים.

target_audience: Jews seeking accessible entry points to practice; anyone interested in Chabad outreach philosophy; readers interested in comparative Jewish-Chinese philosophy
